entries.sentence: One of my walking boots is still wet.
entries.chinese: boot = 靴子；我的一只徒步靴还是湿的。

entries.sentence: Emma wore a silver bracelet to the party.
entries.chinese: bracelet = 手镯；埃玛戴着一个银手镯参加聚会。

entries.sentence: Put on a cap to keep the sun out of your eyes.
entries.chinese: cap = 帽子；戴上帽子，别让阳光照到眼睛。

entries.sentence: I packed enough clothes for the weekend.
entries.chinese: clothes = 衣服；我为周末带了足够的衣服。

entries.sentence: Warm clothing is essential in the mountains.
entries.chinese: clothing = 衣物；在山区，保暖衣物必不可少。

entries.sentence: Hang your coat by the door.
entries.chinese: coat = 外套；把你的外套挂在门边。

entries.sentence: She chose a blue dress for the school dance.
entries.chinese: dress = 连衣裙；她为学校舞会选了一条蓝色连衣裙。

entries.sentence: Maya hopes to work in fashion one day.
entries.chinese: fashion = 时尚行业；玛雅希望将来从事时尚行业。

entries.sentence: I found one glove under the bus seat.
entries.chinese: glove = 手套；我在公交车座位下面找到了一只手套。

entries.sentence: Her keys were at the bottom of her handbag.
entries.chinese: handbag = 手提包；她的钥匙在手提包底部。

entries.sentence: This wool hat keeps my head warm.
entries.chinese: hat = 帽子；这顶羊毛帽能让我的头保持温暖。

entries.sentence: Take a light jacket because it may get cold.
entries.chinese: jacket = 夹克；带一件薄夹克，因为天气可能会变冷。

entries.sentence: These jeans are too long for me.
entries.chinese: jeans = 牛仔裤；这条牛仔裤对我来说太长了。

entries.sentence: The necklace was a gift from her grandmother.
entries.chinese: necklace = 项链；这条项链是她祖母送的礼物。

entries.sentence: He gave her a ring for her birthday.
entries.chinese: ring = 戒指；他送给她一枚戒指作为生日礼物。

entries.sentence: I will ring you back after my class.
entries.chinese: ring back = 回电话；我下课后会给你回电话。

entries.sentence: Please ring up the hotel and check our booking.
entries.chinese: ring up = 打电话；请给酒店打电话确认我们的预订。

entries.sentence: Ben wore a clean white shirt to the interview.
entries.chinese: shirt = 衬衫；本穿着一件干净的白衬衫去面试。

entries.sentence: There is a small stone in my shoe.
entries.chinese: shoe = 鞋；我的鞋里有一颗小石子。

entries.sentence: This skirt has two useful pockets.
entries.chinese: skirt = 裙子；这条裙子有两个实用的口袋。

entries.sentence: I cannot find the other sock.
entries.chinese: sock = 袜子；我找不到另一只袜子。

entries.sentence: I put on a sweatshirt after football practice.
entries.chinese: sweatshirt = 运动衫；足球训练后我穿上了一件运动衫。

entries.sentence: Remember to pack your swimsuit for the pool.
entries.chinese: swimsuit = 泳衣；记得带上去泳池穿的泳衣。

entries.sentence: The team arrived wearing matching tracksuits.
entries.chinese: tracksuit = 运动服；队员们穿着配套的运动服到达了。

entries.sentence: These trousers need a new button.
entries.chinese: trousers = 裤子；这条裤子需要换一颗新纽扣。

entries.sentence: I bought a T-shirt with the festival name on it.
entries.chinese: T-shirt = T恤；我买了一件印有节日名称的T恤。

entries.sentence: Pack clean underpants for each day of the trip.
entries.chinese: underpants = 内裤；旅行期间每天都要带一条干净内裤。

entries.sentence: Keep clean underwear in the top drawer.
entries.chinese: underwear = 内衣；把干净内衣放在最上面的抽屉里。

entries.sentence: You must wear a helmet when riding this bike.
entries.chinese: wear = 穿戴；骑这辆自行车时必须戴头盔。

entries.sentence: These cheap shoes may wear out quickly.
entries.chinese: wear out = 磨坏；这些便宜的鞋可能很快就会磨坏。

entries.sentence: Leave this box blank if the question does not apply to you.
entries.chinese: blank = 空白的；如果这个问题不适用于你，就把这一栏留空。

entries.sentence: We made a birthday card for our teacher.
entries.chinese: card = 卡片；我们为老师做了一张生日卡片。

entries.sentence: This shirt is made of soft cotton.
entries.chinese: cotton = 棉；这件衬衫由柔软的棉制成。

entries.sentence: The museum has a display of old toys.
entries.chinese: display = 展览；博物馆有一个旧玩具展览。

entries.sentence: The school bought new sports equipment.
entries.chinese: equipment = 设备；学校购买了新的体育设备。

entries.sentence: The shop sells locally made goods.
entries.chinese: goods = 商品；这家商店出售当地制造的商品。

entries.sentence: Show your ID card at the entrance.
entries.chinese: ID card = 身份证件；请在入口处出示身份证件。

entries.sentence: I keep my identity card in my wallet.
entries.chinese: identity card = 身份证件；我把身份证件放在钱包里。

entries.sentence: These boots are made of brown leather.
entries.chinese: leather = 皮革；这双靴子由棕色皮革制成。

entries.sentence: Keep the lighter away from young children.
entries.chinese: lighter = 打火机；让打火机远离年幼的孩子。

entries.sentence: Water is a liquid at room temperature.
entries.chinese: liquid = 液体；水在室温下是液体。

entries.sentence: We chose a strong material for the school bags.
entries.chinese: material = 材料；我们为书包选择了一种结实的材料。

entries.sentence: The bridge is made of metal.
entries.chinese: metal = 金属；这座桥由金属制成。

entries.sentence: The shiny object on the beach was a coin.
entries.chinese: object = 物体；海滩上那个闪亮的物体是一枚硬币。

entries.sentence: Heat a little oil in the pan.
entries.chinese: oil = 油；在锅里加热一点油。

entries.sentence: Try not to use single-use plastic.
entries.chinese: plastic = 塑料；尽量不要使用一次性塑料。

entries.sentence: The spoon is made of real silver.
entries.chinese: silver = 银；这把勺子由纯银制成。

entries.sentence: The old wall was built from local stone.
entries.chinese: stone = 石头；这面老墙由当地石料砌成。

entries.sentence: This warm scarf is made of wool.
entries.chinese: wool = 羊毛；这条暖和的围巾由羊毛制成。

entries.sentence: The child pushed a wooden toy train across the floor.
entries.chinese: toy = 玩具；孩子推着一列木制玩具火车穿过地板。
